title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Protocol Recall
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a progressively disclosed skill package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence

stimulus.title: Asset Reuse case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext progressive disclosure. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Agents should regenerate standard artifacts on every run.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation. Artifact under review: a progressively disclosed skill package.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Asset Reuse, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Asset Reuse applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.
